title: Software Update - Release Notes link
scenario: Release Notes popup displays when clicking firmware version link in Device Settings > Software Update when update is available
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected and NOT on the latest firmware (an 'Update Available' banner should appear).
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, tap on 'Software Update'.
5. Locate the blue firmware version text next to the 'Update Available' label (this is the Release Notes link).
6. Tap the blue firmware version (Release Notes link).
expected: A popup is displayed showing the release notes for the available firmware update, similar to the release notes link behavior on the device home page.
